critical_findings.failure_mode: [S1] Scenario description is inverted relative to expected freeze/deny outputs.
critical_findings.impact: Future authors can encode incorrect threshold-boundary assumptions.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Correct threshold-001 description to reflect exhausted-budget override semantics.

critical_findings.failure_mode: [S2] Gate does not block require_review by default because warn is excluded.
critical_findings.impact: CI can report pass while runtime integration expects review blocking.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Block on decision=require_review or include warn in blocking responses by default.

critical_findings.failure_mode: [S2] No scenario validates budget_warning + preexisting_deny preservation path.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Add explicit chaos scenarios for warning+deny and warning+healthy branches.

required_fixes.description: Fix threshold-001 scenario description and keep it semantically aligned with expected outputs.
Harden eval CI gate to block require_review decisions.
Add chaos scenarios that cover budget warning preservation behavior.

watch_items: Test unreachable threshold-only fail status path to keep observability semantics intentional.
failure_mode_summary: FPO trust review identified merge-blocking inconsistencies in CI gate semantics and chaos fixture governance.
